characters.description: A powerful void user who enters Torith while protecting Thomas and Silvi. Despite his unusual abilities, he initially relies on Bronson's rank to pass through the city's guarded districts.
characters.name: Derek Hunt

characters.description: Derek's small void-rabbit companion, who travels with him and Thomas. She communicates telepathically with Derek and is content to ride on Thomas's head as the group enters Torith.
characters.name: Silvi

characters.description: A young spear user traveling under Derek's protection. He enters Torith alongside Derek and Silvi and depends on Bronson's authority to pass the restricted gates.
characters.name: Thomas Stewart

characters.description: A House Gracefall captain whose standing grants Derek's group access to Torith's restricted noble district. City guards recognize his authority, and he serves as the newcomers' first guide through the tiered city.
characters.name: Bronson

characters.description: A Crown Restaurant manager who receives Derek's void-beast offering and considers his proposal to develop coffee. She knows both Bronson and Walter Gracefall and can refer unusually valuable business to her superiors.
characters.name: Stella

characters.description: The head of House Gracefall and Wallace's father. After hearing the account of Wallace's death in the Undying Dungeon, he shelters Derek, Thomas, and Silvi while assessing the danger Derek represents.
characters.name: Walter Gracefall

characters.description: Walter Gracefall's son, whose attacks on villagers ended when Derek killed him.
characters.name: Wallace Gracefall

characters.description: Stella's formidable superior at the Crown Restaurant. She approves unusually favorable terms for Derek's void-beast transaction and authorizes limited Crown assistance if his dispute with Torith's city lord escalates.
characters.name: Alanah

characters.description: The manager of Torith's Adventurer's Guild. He vets Derek's application, formalizes the Guild contract, and explains how combat ability determines rank.
characters.name: Francesco Jacobs

characters.description: A new adventurer acquaintance who helps Thomas obtain a provisional Adventurer's Guild badge. Her interest in Thomas and his possessions has already made Silvi suspicious.
characters.name: Alicia

characters.description: A young warrior to whom Alicia reports Thomas's valuable spear and storage ring. He directs her to preserve Thomas's trust while he considers what to do next.
characters.name: Clay

characters.description: The city lord's son, identified by Walter as the Clay who has been assessing Thomas and his valuables.
characters.name: Clay Torith

characters.description: Walter Gracefall's twelve-year-old great-niece. Though she lacks formal combat training, she shows a natural aptitude for close fighting, leading Derek to recommend knuckles and water cultivation as her foundation.
characters.name: Clare

characters.description: One of Clay's guards. He recognizes Derek Hunt's name when Clay orders Thomas killed and urges the young noble to abandon the attack before Derek intervenes.
characters.name: Bradley

characters.description: Torith's city lord and Clay's father. He learns that his son's failed attack has provoked a dangerous opponent with ties to Alanah, then turns his attention to protecting his household from Derek.
characters.name: Malcolm Torith

characters.description: The captain of Malcolm's guards, assigned from the capital by Malcolm's father. He is present when Malcolm learns of Clay's confrontation with Derek.
characters.name: Captain Herrett

characters.description: Alanah's trusted aide and a former orphan whom she raised. He recruits two resilient boys to test the exceptional-class training approach Alanah learned from Derek.
characters.name: Avery

characters.description: Malcolm's father and a senior power in House Torith. He arrives to challenge Alanah over Derek's threats against his family.
characters.name: Gerald Torith

characters.description: The village chief and an established ally within Derek's protected circle. She leads the survivors connected to Derek and shares his concern for the safety of the displaced villagers.
characters.name: Rayna West

characters.description: A gifted young craftsperson under Derek's protection. Her unusual potential across several trades makes her valuable, while also creating a danger that powerful people may try to control her work.
characters.name: Brandi Fields

characters.description: Brandi's mother and protector, and one of the village survivors in Derek's circle. Her priority is her daughter's welfare as the displaced group considers how to build a safer future.
characters.name: Malorie

characters.description: The village's royal-appointed overseer. Richard identifies her as the official who accepted the stolen storage rings and allowed Brandi and Malorie to be carried away.
characters.name: Patricia Collins

characters.description: A former guard employed by the village overseer. He explains that her death ended his negotiated contract, agrees to answer Derek honestly, and describes a class built around drafting and completing agreements.
characters.name: Rudy

characters.description: Returning village elders and family guardians of Thomas. They are part of the community Derek has undertaken to protect after the village's earlier losses.
characters.name: Richard and Delilah

characters.description: The former Captain Herrett, now free of the bindings that tied him to House Torith. He renounces his title, explains the coercion behind his service, and considers a new working relationship with Derek.
characters.name: Jacks

characters.description: The head of House Savannah, described by Alanah as an exceptional identifier and capable businesswoman. She is politically neutral and firmly suppresses illegal trade and coercive contracts within Savannah.
characters.name: Natalie Savannah

characters.description: A notorious high-level assassin who projects poisoned weapons. He and Ogre ambush Derek while operating under a contract that explicitly excludes Stella from attack.
characters.name: Bones

characters.description: An exceptionally large melee assassin who works with Bones. He joins the contracted ambush on Derek while leaving Stella unharmed under the assignment's terms.
characters.name: Ogre
